variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 7101 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 7101 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 7101 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 395.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 318.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 300.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 82.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 61.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 52.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 40 001 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 7101
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 40 001 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 7101
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 400.0 mm, Dimension B: 318.0 mm, Dimension H: 61.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4432 Panel Air Filter Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 7101
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4432 Panel Air Filter Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 7101
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4432 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
